MINI MINUTES: JPT: Adrian Colley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Liana Tahir is present.
Attorney Timothy Larson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Claribel Cruz is present with Court appointed Spanish interpreter Kenneth Wright.
Attorney Sebastian Kaplan appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JAN-09-2017 is vacated. (501)
